title: Loom SDLC Configuration
description: Project-level configuration for the Loom SDLC framework.

version.description: Schema version. Currently only version 1 is supported.

backlog_cwd.description: Absolute or ~-prefixed path to the Backlog.md repository. Must match the --cwd in .mcp.json.

default_branch.description: The default branch name for git operations. Defaults to 'main' if omitted.

oneOf.description: Named context slots. Keys are slot names referenced by playbooks; values are file paths relative to the project root.
